name: AWS.Amplify.Analytics

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { credentials : AWS.Credentials.Credentials, clientInfo : AWS.Amplify.ClientInfo.ClientInfo, applicationId : String.String, sessionId : String.String, identityId : String.String, region : AWS.Config.Region }

aliases.name: Event
aliases.type: { eventId : String.String, name : String.String, timestamp : Time.Posix, attributes : Dict.Dict String.String String.String }

name: AWS.Amplify.Auth

values.name: configure
values.comment:
Configure authentication.

Fetches identity id from identity pool and then fetches credentials for identity id.

    AWS.Amplify.Auth.configure
        { region = "ap-southeast-2"
        , identityPoolId = "ap-southeast-2:123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000"
        }

name: AWS.Amplify.ClientInfo

aliases.name: ClientInfo
aliases.comment:
Data type for storing client information.

See [ClientDevice/browser.ts][browser] for how to populate this record

[browser]: https://github.com/aws-amplify/amplify-js/blob/5b4641b8568e3106db81958f1cb2ce0b6d684ab6/packages/core/src/ClientDevice/browser.ts
aliases.type: { platform : String.String, make : String.String, model : String.String, version : String.String, appVersion : String.String, language : String.String, timezone : String.String }
